name: Qualys
description:
This plugin is used to fetch Assets data from the 'Cyber Security Asset management > Inventory Page', Asset Vulnerabilities from the 'Vulnerability Management Detection & Response > Vulnerabilities' page, Web Applications data from the 'Web Application Scanning > Applications' page and Web Application Findings from the 'Web Application Scanning > Detections' page. This plugin also supports 'Add/Remove Asset Tag(s)', 'Scan Assets' and 'Add/Remove Web Application Tag(s) actions.

 Netskope normalization score calculation => 1000 - (Qualys Asset/Web Application Risk Score).

configuration.label: API Server URL
configuration.description: API Server URL of the Qualys instance.

configuration.label: API Gateway URL
configuration.description: API Gateway URL of the Qualys instance.

configuration.label: Username
configuration.description: The Username associated with the Qualys account.

configuration.label: Password
configuration.description: The Password associated with the Qualys account.
